From: Li, Amy 
Sent: Wednesday, April 29, 2020 5:22 PM
To: Phillips, Kadesha <Kadesha.Phillips@rsli.com>
Subject: Lampert's Home Therapy, Inc._VPS 328044

Hi Kadesha,

Attached are PDF policy and cert for Lampert's Home Therapy, Inc._VPS 328044.

Amend adding Class 3 and 4 management effective on 01/01/2020 and will replace previous policy and cert.

Please review and let me know if you have any questions.

thanks,
Amy Li
